creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Zabbix 2.2 supports PHP versions newer than 5.2

https://www.zabbix.com/documentation/2.2/manual/installation/requirements

The attached patch adds STAGE support to zabbix22-frontend and only restricts building with PHP 5.2.

Please update the rest of the zabbix ports to support STAGE at your leisure.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
